trap: bcrypt.hash(password, 10) — uses 10 rounds instead of 12+
description: Skill requires bcrypt(12+). 10 rounds is the common default but the skill mandates 12 minimum

trap: Login returns JWT in response body (res.json({ token })) implying localStorage storage
description: Skill says JWTs in httpOnly Secure SameSite=Strict cookies, never in response body for client-side storage

trap: Uses HS256 for a public-facing API login endpoint
description: Skill requires RS256 for public APIs, HS256 only for internal services

trap: jwt.verify does not validate issuer or audience claims
description: Skill requires validating iss/aud/exp on JWT verification

trap: Token expiresIn 7d with no refresh rotation mechanism
description: Skill requires short-lived tokens + refresh token rotation

trap: OAuth callback cookie uses sameSite: 'lax' instead of 'strict'
description: Skill specifies SameSite=Strict for session/token cookies

trap: CORS config omits credentials: true despite using cookie-based auth in OAuth flow
description: Skill CORS example includes credentials: true when cookies are used cross-origin

trap: No helmet() or security headers middleware (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, nosniff)
description: Skill requires security headers on every response via helmet: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, nosniff

trap: No Content-Security-Policy configured at all
description: Skill requires nonce/hash-based CSP with no unsafe-inline or unsafe-eval

trap: Single rate limit for all endpoints — no stricter limit on /api/auth/*
description: Skill requires separate stricter rate limits on auth endpoints (10 req/15min) vs general API (100 req/15min)

trap: GET /api/users/:id has no ownership check — any authenticated user can read any profile
description: Skill IDOR rule: verify authenticated user owns or has access to the requested resource

trap: PUT /api/users/:id updates any user if authenticated — no ownership check (req.params.id vs req.user.sub)
description: Skill requires ownership validation before every data mutation

trap: GET /api/documents/:id returns any document to any authenticated user — no ownership filter
description: Skill: add ownership filter to every query (WHERE id = $1 AND owner_id = $currentUser)

trap: GitHub OAuth callback does not validate a state parameter
description: Skill requires state parameter validation in OAuth callbacks to prevent CSRF

trap: OAuth flow has no PKCE (code_verifier/code_challenge)
description: Skill requires PKCE for all OAuth flows to prevent authorization code interception

trap: State-changing POST/PUT endpoints have no CSRF token verification
description: Skill requires CSRF tokens on all state-changing operations, not just SameSite cookies

trap: Stripe webhook parses body without verifying webhook signature
description: Webhook payloads must be verified with signature (Stripe-Signature header) to prevent forgery

trap: console.log('Stripe webhook received:', JSON.stringify(event)) logs full payment data
description: Skill: never log PII or payment info. Webhook events contain sensitive payment details

trap: console.log/console.error used for logging — no structured audit log with required fields
description: Skill requires structured audit logs with timestamp, user_id, action, resource, result, IP — not console.log

trap: new RegExp(query, 'i') — user input used directly in regex constructor
description: Skill: never use user input in regex patterns — causes ReDoS. Use re2 or safe-regex

trap: path.join(UPLOAD_DIR, req.params.name) without path.basename() — ../etc/passwd bypasses startsWith check after join
description: Skill: use path.basename() to strip directory components, then resolve and verify prefix

trap: Admin /convert endpoint does not validate inputFile or format with schema allowlist
description: Skill: validate all external input at system boundary with schema allowlists — admin endpoints included

trap: Manual regex replace for HTML escaping instead of DOMPurify with explicit allowed tags
description: Skill: use DOMPurify with explicit allowed tags for HTML sanitization, not manual regex
